Class JdbcRunRepository

java.lang.Object
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.persistence.query.JdbcRunRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
RunRepository
public final class JdbcRunRepository extends Object implements RunRepository
JDBC read repository used by reporting and web dashboard.

    Constructor
    Description
    JdbcRunRepository(DataSource dataSource)
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ExperimentAnalytics
    analyzeExperiment(String experimentId, String objectiveDirection, Double targetFitness)
    Computes experiment-level aggregate analytics and profile curves.
    ProblemComparisonReport
    compareAlgorithmsOnProblem(String problemType, String objectiveDirection, Double targetFitness, List<String> algorithms)
    Computes cross-algorithm comparison for one problem family.
    ExperimentDeletionResult
    deleteExperiment(String experimentId)
    Hard-deletes one experiment and all dependent run data.
    ExperimentDetail
    getExperimentDetail(String experimentId)
    Returns one experiment metadata row or null when id does not exist.
    RunDetail
    getRunDetail(String runId)
    Returns rich run detail record or null when run does not exist.
    List<CheckpointRow>
    listCheckpoints(String runId)
    Lists checkpoints for one run.
    PageResult<EventRow>
    listEvents(String runId, String eventType, String q, int page, int size)
    Lists events for one run with optional filtering and paging.
    List<ExperimentParamRow>
    listExperimentParams(String runId)
    Lists flattened experiment parameters for run's experiment.
    PageResult<ExperimentRunItem>
    listExperimentRuns(String experimentId, int page, int size, String sortBy, String sortDir)
    Lists runs for one experiment with pagination and sortable columns.
    PageResult<ExperimentListItem>
    listExperiments(ExperimentQuery query)
    Returns one page of experiments matching provided query.
    FilterFacets
    listFacets()
    Lists distinct facet values used by dashboard filters.
    List<IterationMetric>
    listIterations(String runId)
    Lists iteration metrics for one run.
    List<String>
    listRunIdsForExperiment(String experimentId)
    Lists run ids belonging to one experiment.
    PageResult<RunListItem>
    listRuns(RunQuery query)
    Returns one page of runs matching provided query.
    StopRequestResult
    requestExperimentStop(String experimentId, String requestedBy, String reason)
    Requests cooperative stop for all running runs in one experiment.
    StopRequestResult
    requestRunStop(String runId, String requestedBy, String reason)
    Requests cooperative stop for one run.
